steps.t: Explore the Nink-hai camp along the mountain path east of Faldham. Langfrith has asked you to infiltrate the Orc camp and discover the leader of the t…
The Nink-hai leader can be found at the end of the mountain pass in the mountains. Langfrith has asked you to infiltrate the Orc camp and defeat the l…
Langfrith awaits outside the mead hall of Faldham. Langfrith will want to hear of the events that transpired with the Nink-hai leader.
